patches.name: Disable update prompts
patches.description: Prevents Avito's force-update screen opener from launching update screens.

patches.name: Hide VPN detection
patches.description: Prevents apps from detecting VPN transport through common Android network APIs.

patches.name: Hide USB debugging
patches.description: Prevents apps from detecting USB debugging and related developer settings through common Android APIs.

patches.name: Disable Sentry telemetry
patches.description: Disables Sentry telemetry by turning off SDK auto-init and clearing the DSN.

patches.name: Disable Firebase telemetry
patches.description: Disables Firebase telemetry collection flags and DataTransport sender entry points.

patches.name: Disable AppMetrica
patches.description: Disables AppMetrica and legacy Yandex Metrica SDK entry points.

patches.name: Disable AppsFlyer
patches.description: Disables AppsFlyer install referrer and attribution manifest entry points.

patches.name: Disable Adjust
patches.description: Disables Adjust attribution manifest entry points.

patches.name: Disable Google Analytics
patches.description: Disables legacy Google Analytics manifest entry points.

patches.name: Disable RuStore metrics
patches.description: Disables RuStore metrics manifest entry points.

patches.name: Remove ads
patches.description: Disables Avito ads by removing ad SDK entry points and short-circuiting commercial banner loading.

patches.name: Avito privacy
patches.description: Disables Avito first-party clickstream analytics and Avito's direct Adjust telemetry wrapper.

patches.name: Hide Avi bottom tab
patches.description: Removes the Avi assistant button from Avito's bottom navigation bar.
